blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 29°F.
